scenario_description: Agent must respond to offshore-skepticism objection without reverting to defensive vendor jargon after 3 prior turns.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B, 40-person eng team, hired 5 backend engineers in 45 days, no AI adoption, CTO skeptical of vendor solutions.

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent, ground truth elements are mostly verifiable with clear checks, but some tone markers may require nuanced interpretation.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|thought leader|best-in-class|excellence|leverage talent|innovative solutions|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: hired 5 backend engineers in 45 days|no AI adoption yet

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
